title: Indian Cinema and Bollywood
description: A modern Indian film round with classic cinema, auteurs, music, landmark performances, and notable awards.

questions.prompt: Which filmmaker directed Lagaan?
questions.hint: He also directed Swades and Jodhaa Akbar.

questions.prompt: Which Mehboob Khan film became India's first Oscar-nominated feature in the foreign language category?
questions.hint: Nargis played the lead role of Radha.

questions.prompt: Who directed Pyaasa and Kaagaz Ke Phool?
questions.hint: He is one of the great tragic figures of Hindi cinema.

questions.prompt: Which actress played Rosie in Guide?
questions.hint: She also starred in Pyaasa, Kagaz Ke Phool, and Chaudhvin Ka Chand.

questions.prompt: Which Satyajit Ray film won the Best Human Document award at Cannes in 1956?
questions.hint: It was the first part of the Apu Trilogy.

questions.prompt: Who wrote the dialogues for Sholay as part of a celebrated screenwriting duo?
questions.hint: The duo also wrote Deewaar and Don.

questions.prompt: Which composer won two Academy Awards for Slumdog Millionaire after already transforming Indian film music with Roja?
questions.hint: His initials are A. R.

questions.prompt: Who directed Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.hint: He is the elder son of Yash Chopra.

questions.prompt: Which actor played Mogambo in Mr. India?
questions.hint: He was among Indian cinema's most iconic villains.

questions.prompt: Which actor played Sanjay Singhania in Ghajini?
questions.hint: He is often called Mr. Perfectionist.

questions.prompt: Which filmmaker directed Satya, Company, and Sarkar?
questions.hint: His initials are R. G. V.

questions.prompt: Which singer is known as the Nightingale of India?
questions.hint: Her younger sister Asha Bhosle is also a legendary playback singer.

questions.prompt: Which lyricist wrote 'Ae Mere Watan Ke Logon'?
questions.hint: His pen name began with Kavi.

questions.prompt: Which Bimal Roy film won the first Filmfare Award for Best Film?
questions.hint: It follows the struggles of a peasant family.

questions.prompt: Which actress played the title role in Umrao Jaan in the 1981 film by Muzaffar Ali?
questions.hint: She later won the National Award for the role.

questions.prompt: Who directed Mughal-e-Azam?
questions.hint: His initials are K. A.

questions.prompt: Which Hrishikesh Mukherjee comedy featured Bhawani Shankar and Ramprasad-Damprasad?
questions.hint: Amol Palekar starred in it.

questions.prompt: Which composer duo created the music for Shree 420, Sangam, and Mera Naam Joker?
questions.hint: They worked closely with Raj Kapoor for years.

questions.prompt: Which actor played Milkha Singh in Bhaag Milkha Bhaag?
questions.hint: He is the son of lyricist Javed Akhtar.

questions.prompt: Which actress played Naina Catherine Kapur in Kal Ho Naa Ho?
questions.hint: She also starred in Dil Se.. and Veer-Zaara.

questions.prompt: Which film by Ritesh Batra revolved around a mistaken lunchbox delivery in Mumbai?
questions.hint: It starred Irrfan Khan and Nimrat Kaur.

questions.prompt: Which filmmaker directed Arth, Saaransh, and Zakhm?
questions.hint: He is the father of actress Pooja Bhatt.

questions.prompt: Which actor won the National Film Award for Best Actor for Paan Singh Tomar?
questions.hint: He later starred in The Lunchbox and Hindi Medium.

questions.prompt: Which singer, younger sister of Lata Mangeshkar, gave voice to many of Madhubala's best-known songs?
questions.hint: She also sang extensively for Helen and Rekha.

questions.prompt: Who directed Barfi!?
questions.hint: He also directed Life in a... Metro and Jagga Jasoos.

questions.prompt: Which actor played Emperor Akbar in Jodhaa Akbar?
questions.hint: He is the son of filmmaker Rakesh Roshan.

questions.prompt: Which classic Hindi film featured the song 'Waqt ne kiya kya haseen sitam'?
questions.hint: It starred Guru Dutt and Waheeda Rehman.

questions.prompt: Which director made Chak De! India?
questions.hint: He also directed Rocket Singh: Salesman of the Year.

questions.prompt: Which actor played the retired DCP Anant Kumar Shrivastav in Khakee?
questions.hint: He is known for a famous baritone voice.

questions.prompt: Which Malayalam auteur directed Elippathayam and Mathilukal?
questions.hint: He is one of the giants of parallel cinema in Kerala.

questions.prompt: Which actress portrayed Geeta Phogat in Dangal?
questions.hint: She made a striking comeback to films with that role after being a child actor.

questions.prompt: Which writer created Feluda and Professor Shonku?
questions.hint: He also directed the Apu Trilogy.

questions.prompt: Which music director, billed as Raamlaxman, composed the songs of Maine Pyar Kiya and Hum Aapke Hain Koun..!?
questions.hint: His screen name merged two names, though he worked solo later.

questions.prompt: Which film adaptation of Devdas was directed by Sanjay Leela Bhansali and starred Shah Rukh Khan?
questions.hint: It released in 2002 and featured Aishwarya Rai and Madhuri Dixit.

questions.prompt: Which actor played the title role in Sardar Udham?
questions.hint: He also portrayed Sam Manekshaw in Sam Bahadur.

questions.prompt: Which actress won the National Film Award for Best Actress for Queen?
questions.hint: She played Rani Mehra.

questions.prompt: Which filmmaker directed Black Friday, Gulaal, and Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.hint: He also co-created Sacred Games.

questions.prompt: Which actor played the role of Jordan in Rockstar?
questions.hint: He is the son of actors Rishi Kapoor and Neetu Singh.

questions.prompt: Which actress made a celebrated comeback to Hindi cinema with English Vinglish?
questions.hint: She was one of the biggest stars of the late 1980s and 1990s.

questions.prompt: Which film won the Academy Award for Best Original Song for 'Naatu Naatu'?
questions.hint: It was directed by S. S. Rajamouli.

questions.prompt: Who directed the courtroom drama Pink?
questions.hint: He also directed Lootera and Sirf Ek Bandaa Kaafi Hai.

questions.prompt: Which actor played Murad in Gully Boy?
questions.hint: He later played Kapil Dev in 83.

questions.prompt: Which actress starred as Veronica in Cocktail?
questions.hint: She later played Piku and Mastani.

questions.prompt: Which 1971 Raj Kapoor film starred him opposite Dimple Kapadia in her debut?
questions.hint: Its music included 'Hum Tum Ek Kamre Mein Band Ho'.

questions.prompt: Which composer duo created the soundtrack of Qayamat Se Qayamat Tak?
questions.hint: Their first names were Anand and Milind.

questions.prompt: Which actress played Sehmat in Raazi?
questions.hint: She is the daughter of filmmaker Mahesh Bhatt.

questions.prompt: Which veteran actor played the title role in Paa?
questions.hint: He played a child with progeria.

questions.prompt: Which actor won acclaim for playing the lead in Masaan as Deepak Kumar?
questions.hint: He later starred in Uri and Sardar Udham.

questions.prompt: Which actress played the role of Nisha in Hum Aapke Hain Koun..!?
questions.hint: She is also known for Dil To Pagal Hai and Devdas.

questions.prompt: Which filmmaker directed Article 15?
questions.hint: He also directed Mulk and Thappad.
